detailed_description: The video shows a person performing a nightly ritual, spraying a product from a dark bottle onto a fluffy grey pillow on a well-made bed. The hand methodically applies the spray, suggesting the use of a linen or sleep spray to enhance comfort before sleeping. The on-screen text, 'Me every night before bed 🌙😴💤', explicitly frames the action as a consistent part of a relaxing evening routine, emphasizing product interaction within a personal, calm lifestyle context. The entire duration captures the consistent and repetitive action of preparing for bed.

segments.why_kept: This segment is kept in its entirety because it fully encompasses the core action of the video: the continuous and deliberate spraying of a pillow with a product as part of a stated nightly routine. There is no setup, post-action dead air, or extraneous footage; the entire clip demonstrates the 'Product Interaction' and 'Night Routine' which are the primary hero moments.
